name: @andypf/json-viewer
when_to_use: 需要对大 JSON 做折叠层级、工具栏搜索、类型提示与复制时用它而非手写递归 DOM,因为原生手写在几百节点后的状态、搜索定位和性能上失败。
why_valuable: AI 默认只能稳定输出静态 <pre>,手写递归 <details> 也缺少搜索、展开深度、类型提示和大树状态维护;该组件把任意 JSON 直接变成自带 shadow 样式的可探索树。

en.when_to_use: Use it instead of a hand-written recursive DOM when you need collapsible hierarchy, toolbar search, type hints, and copying for large JSON, because hand-written implementations fail at state, search navigation, and performance beyond a few hundred nodes.
en.why_valuable: AI can normally only produce a stable static <pre>; a hand-written recursive <details> tree also lacks search, expansion depth, type hints, and large-tree state management. This component turns arbitrary JSON directly into an explorable tree with its own shadow styles.

data_in.note: Assign the primary input directly to the data property of <andypf-json-viewer>; use the object property rather than the data HTML attribute to avoid stringify and escaping ambiguity.

schema.JSONValue: null | boolean | number | string | JSONValue[] | { [key: string]: JSONValue }
schema.expanded?: number | boolean -- initial expansion depth, default 1; true expands all, false collapses all
schema.indent?: number -- spaces of indentation per level, default 2
schema.theme?: string | Record<string,string> -- built-in theme name or CSS variable object, default 'default-light'
schema.showToolbar?: boolean -- search and expansion toolbar, default false
schema.preserveExpanded?: boolean -- preserve expansion state when data changes, default false

data_in.note: 主输入直接赋给 <andypf-json-viewer> 的 data 属性;用对象属性而非 data HTML attribute,避免 stringify 与转义歧义。
data_in._why_no_example: JSON 是 AI 原生数据形态,data 直传且配置浅;裁剪 schema 足够,不附 minimal example。

schema.JSONValue: null | boolean | number | string | JSONValue[] | { [key: string]: JSONValue }
schema.expanded?: number | boolean —— 初始展开深度,默认 1;true 全展开,false 全折叠
schema.indent?: number —— 每层缩进空格数,默认 2
schema.theme?: string | Record<string,string> —— 内置主题名或 CSS 变量对象,默认 'default-light'
schema.showToolbar?: boolean —— 搜索与展开工具栏,默认 false
schema.preserveExpanded?: boolean —— 数据变化时保留展开状态,默认 false

carriers.widget: supported:以 JS createElement 挂入宿主 shadowRoot;组件再用自身 shadow DOM 封装全部基底样式,无 document.head 注入
carriers.codex: supported:ESM CDN + custom element,无 worker/wasm/外部图片或 uplink 需求

isolation.evidence: +esm:`attachShadow` x1(自带 Shadow DOM,46 主题样式封装其内);全部 addEventListener(click x4/mouseenter x2/mouseleave x2)挂在其内部 shadow 元素;零 document.head/body。README 明示『Web Components + Shadow DOM』。落入宿主 shadowRoot 形成嵌套 shadow,正常工作。
